Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; con = sqlite3.connect\('data.db'\); print\('Distinct projects:', con.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT project_id\) FROM project'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\); print\('Distinct subjects:', con.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT subject_id\) FROM subject'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\); con.close\(\)")
